name: Cursor
goal: Render a blinking caret indicator beside streaming LLM-generated text.
description: A purely visual blinking caret used by chat surfaces while assistant tokens are arriving. Three shapes (bar, block, underline) and a configurable blink interval; no slots, no events, no state.

props.name: shape
props.description: Caret geometry: bar (thin vertical), block (full character cell), underline (baseline tick).

props.name: blinkMs
props.description: Total blink cycle duration in milliseconds.

cssVariables.name: --ce-cursor-blink-ms
cssVariables.description: Inline-set blink interval; consumes the blink-ms attribute.

sideEffects.description: Renders an aria-hidden span with a CSS keyframe blink animation.

a11y.notes: The caret is decorative; the rendered span is aria-hidden so screen readers don't announce a blinking artifact. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.
